src: A brown teddy bear with soft plush fur, left hand up, right hand on the leg. It has creamy round paws, a stitched smile, a blue ice pack on its head, and a patch on its chest reading "Get Well".
edit: A brown teddy bear drawn with black outlines and vibrant colors. The left hand is highlighted, the right hand is resting on the leg. It has fur of comic-book patterns, round paws, a stitched smile, a blue ice pack on its head, and a comic-book-styled "Get Well" patch on its chest.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is on a large textured rock outdoors, surrounded by green foliage and a paved pathway, with another big rock in the back on the left, captured from a right side angle.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is on a smooth concrete surface beside a gently flowing river, with a grassy backdrop, viewed from a lower angle, highlighting the rippling water and scattered green leaves.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object sits on an asphalt road with worn markings, viewed from the front and slightly left. The road stretches behind with faint tire imprints and a slope to the right.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object rests on vibrant green park grass, rotated slightly to the left, surrounded by lush grass blades with no obstruction.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is against a brick wall on a concrete sidewalk, viewed straight on at eye level. The wall emphasizes the texture of the bricks and the smoothness of the concrete. A dry leaf is noticeable to the side.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: An object sits on a grand rock, outdoors with bold outlines in a comic-book style, located slightly distant and surrounded by green foliage, a paved path, and a large rock in the background on the left, captured from a right angle.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: the object is situated on a vibrant, bold-colored surface, right beside a sketch-like flowing river with a cartoonish grassy backdrop, viewed from a lower angle, the water has thick, black outlines and green leaves in flat colors, in comic-book fashion.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object rests on a black-and-white asphalt road with worn markings, seen from the front, slightly tilted left. The road stretches into angular lines, with tire imprints and a slope to the right, in comic-book style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object rests on vibrant, exaggerated green grass in a comic-book style park, surrounded by lush blades with bold outlines and vivid colors. Rotated slightly to the left, the scene captures rich green hues, ensuring a clear, focused view.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object stands against a vibrant illustrated brick wall on a smooth ink-drawn concrete sidewalk, viewed at eye level. The wall has texture with thick outlines. To the side, there is a dry leaf.

prompt_shared: comic book styled teddy bear plushie
